description_long: This is a rectangular wooden cabin with a gable roof covered in reddish-brown shingles, giving it a rustic yet sturdy appearance. The front facade features a set of double doors with glass panes and a small wooden step, flanked by a large multi-pane window to one side. The side walls are constructed from light-colored timber planks, with one side displaying a wide, multi-pane window and the other side being solid with no openings. The rear wall is plain, composed entirely of wood planks without any windows or doors. The cabin is elevated slightly above the ground on concrete or stone footings, suggesting stability and protection from moisture. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for use as a small residential or garden structure in an urban or suburban setting.
description: A rectangular wooden cabin with a gable roof, double glass-paneled doors, and large multi-pane windows, elevated on concrete footings.
description_view_0: Front view showing double glass-paneled doors in the center, a large multi-pane window to the right, and a small wooden step.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a wide, multi-pane window centered on the wall, with the gable roof sloping above.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but without doors; features a large multi-pane window and solid wood construction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain wooden wall and no windows or doors, under the gable roof.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch, covered in reddish-brown asphalt shingles and slight overhangs on all sides
attribute_window_arrangement: Two large, rectangular, multi-pane windows: one on the front facade to the right of the doors, and one centered on the left side wall, both horizontally oriented and symmetrically placed
attribute_door_placement: One set of double doors centered on the front facade, directly accessible via a small step
